text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer! I hope this year will be
an auspicious one!
choice_data_list:
Happy New Year! What's your New Year's
resolution?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My resolution? Hmm... Good question. I haven't
thought of anything yet.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What about pulling a fortune slip with the luckiest
outcome? Wait, I'm pretty sure that was my
resolution last year too...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I know! How about pulling a fortune slip that says
"One more fortune, on the house"?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Winning the grand-prize in a raffle is
pretty high on my list of goals too. Howzabout
them for some resolutions?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I just can't come up with anything good.
What's a good resolution?
choice_data_list: Well, you're about to start your classic year...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp?! You're right. I'm not a junior anymore. Then, what about...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to win some big race! I know that's pretty
vague, but still.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Well, I guess I'm going with that, then!
Now that I've got a goal in mind, it really makes
me want to put my luck to the test.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I know! I've got somewhere I want to take you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, bet you thought I was talking about a
shrine. Sorry to disappoint, but even the
shopping district becomes a place to test your
luck around New Year's.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look, lucky bags! Pick one, and we can see if luck
is on our side this year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Which bag are you gonna choose?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The plastic bag? Oh yeah, that's the only one
that's see-through.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You can already see what's inside, so there's no
chance of ending up with a dud! You never
disappoint, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That would have never occurred to me. Wow, I
feel like my smarts just went up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Why leave things to luck when there's a
fool-proof method available to you? It seems
Matikanefukukitaru has learned a valuable lesson
today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The super stuffed one? It definitely looks like
they've packed a lot of things inside. That's what
you want?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I open the bag and look inside...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, it's just a bunch of unsold food. Snacks
close to their expiry date, carrots, stuff like that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I can practically smell the luck coming from
this stuff! I'm sure it will nourish our spirits, if not
our health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what exactly she's trying to say... but
the food does seem to give her some energy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Foot bags? Ohhh, you mean those socks over
there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what's supposed to be lucky about
them, but I guess it wouldn't hurt to buy a pair...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Actually, they might give my stride something
special if I run in them. Let's go for a New Year's
run and take 'em for a spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have a new tool in our arsenal that will
broaden the scope of her running. I have a feeling
our future training sessions will go a lot more
smoothly.
